source: IRS Revenue Procedure 2025-32; Tax Foundation summary
notes: Brackets apply to taxable income (gross income minus the standard deduction, assuming no itemizing). Each bracket taxes only the income within its own range - marginal, not flat. 'up_to' is the top of the taxable-income range for that rate; null means no upper bound. Head of household and married-filing-separately schedules aren't included yet - add if the app needs to support those filing statuses.
